gap_findings.description: Argentina makes no commitment on adaptation finance.
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG2 Chapter 17: adaptation finance gaps persist; developing countries need significantly more than current flows.

gap_findings.description: Argentina's NDC is conditional on receiving international finance.
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG2 Chapter 17: adaptation finance gaps persist; developing countries need significantly more than current flows.

details.summary: Argentina's NDC lacks any commitment on adaptation finance, and its conditional dependency on international finance creates delivery risk.

pass_c.country_summary: Argentina's NDC lacks any commitment on adaptation finance, and its conditional dependency on international finance creates delivery risk.
pass_c.policy_recommendation: Argentina should commit to a specific adaptation finance target and ensure its NDC is unconditional to receive international finance.
